A.title: Topic vocabulary (gap fill)
A.instructions: Complete the sentences with words from the box.

questions.sentence: We need to ...... the hotel before the weekend.
Don't forget your ...... or you won't be able to travel internationally.
The train to Madrid leaves from ...... 4.
The roads are always ...... at 8 a.m.
There was heavy ...... so we arrived late at the station.
How much ...... can I take on this airline?
Our final ...... is a small town on the coast.
I love going ...... to practise my English.

B.title: Circle the correct word
B.instructions: Choose the correct option in each sentence.

questions.sentence: We found cheap **accommodation / souvenir** near the beach.
The ferry was delayed, so our **trip / vehicle** took longer than expected.
Please don't **cancel / pack** your ticket at the last minute.
If we hurry, we can still **catch / crash** the train.
That mountain road isn't suitable for a large **vehicle / harbour**.
This route is more **convenient / foreign** because it's direct.

C.title: Phrasal verbs (complete the gaps)
C.instructions: Write the correct phrasal verb in each gap.

questions.sentence: We need to ...... early if we want to avoid traffic.
Hurry up and ...... the bus before the doors close.
I usually ...... the train at the central station.
Please ...... the car and help me with the bags.
Our plane will ...... in about ten minutes.
After the holiday, we didn't want to ...... home.

D.title: Prepositional phrases (matching)
D.instructions: Match sentence beginnings with the correct ending.

questions.sentence: We travelled to the island **D** by air.
Everyone waited quietly **F** on board.
They explored the old town **B** on foot.
My parents are **E** on holiday.
The train arrived exactly **A** on schedule.
The resort is located **C** on the coast.

E.title: Word patterns (adjectives and verbs)
E.instructions: Write one preposition in each gap.

questions.sentence: Our hotel is very close ...... the city centre.
This town is famous ...... its seafood restaurants.
The village is far ...... the main road.
Sorry I'm late ...... the meeting.
Can you ask the receptionist ...... local bus times?
We had to wait ...... nearly an hour.
She provided us ...... a detailed map.

F.title: Word formation
F.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct form of the word in capitals.

questions.sentence: The city is a major tourist ...... in summer. (ATTRACT)
I wrote down the ...... so we wouldn't get lost. (DIRECT)
Our ...... from the port was delayed by fog. (DEPART)
She is a very careful ...... and never speeds. (DRIVE)
The morning ...... to Paris was full. (FLY)
He's an experienced ...... and knows all the local routes. (TRAVEL)
The museum receives many ...... every year. (VISIT)
The sofa bed wasn't very ...... for two people. (COMFORT)
We finally ...... our destination after a long journey.
Could you ...... me with a copy of the timetable?
This excursion is more suitable ...... younger children.
We'll go ...... if the weather gets worse.
Please ...... details at the information desk.
The cruise was cancelled because of bad ...... conditions.

H.title: Mixed revision
H.instructions: Complete the sentences with one suitable word.

questions.sentence: Let's take a ...... in a café before we continue our trip.
Is there a nearby bus stop, or do we have to go on ...... ?
The airport wasn't far ...... our hotel, so we walked.
If you don't ...... now, you'll miss your flight.
We got ...... the coach at the final station.
Can you ...... at this map and tell me where we are?
The ferry left on schedule and arrived ...... time.
Don't forget to buy a small ...... for your grandparents.
